title: Systems and methods for finishing additive manufacturing faces with different orientations
abstract: An additive manufacturing system (10) includes a build platform (38), at least one first consolidation device (14), and at least one second consolidation device (60). The at least one first consolidation device (14) is configured to direct at least one first energy beam (28) to a first face (44) of a component (24). The first face (44) has a first orientation. The at least one second consolidation device (60) is configured to simultaneously direct at least one second energy beam(70) toward a second face (25) of the component (24) as the first consolidation device (14) directs the at least one first energy beam (28) toward the first face (44). The second face (25) has a second orientation different from the first orientation.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. An additive manufacturing system (10) comprising: a build platform (38); at least one first consolidation device (14) configured to direct at least one first energy beam (28) to a first face (44) of a component (24), wherein the first face (44) has a first orientation; and at least one second consolidation device (60) configured to simultaneously direct at least one second energy beam (70) toward a second face (25) of the component (24) as said first consolidation device (14) directs the at least one first energy beam (28) toward the first face (44), wherein the second face (25) has a second orientation different from the first orientation. 2. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein said second consolidation device (60) is configured to finish the second face (25) of the component (24). 3. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein said second consolidation device (60) is configured to consolidate the second face (25) of the component (24). 4. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein the second face (25) is oriented substantially orthogonal to the first face (44). 5. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein the second face (25) of the component (24) is a down facing face (100) of the component (24). 6. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein said at least one second consolidation device (60) comprises a plurality of second consolidation devices (60) positioned circumferentially around the component (24). 7. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1 further comprising an actuator system (36) coupled to said at least one second consolidation device (60) and configured to move said at least one second consolidation device (60). 8. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 7, wherein said actuator system (36) is configured to move said at least one second consolidation device (60) circumferentially about the component (24). 9. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein the first face (44) is offset from said build platform (38) and is oriented substantially parallel to said build platform (38). 10. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein the second face (25) is oriented substantially orthogonal to said build platform (38). 11. The additive manufacturing system (10) of Claim 1, wherein said at least one first consolidation device (14) and said at least one second consolidation device (60) are the same. 12. A controller (34) for use in an additive manufacturing system (10) including at least one first consolidation device (14) and at least one second consolidation device (60), the at least one first consolidation device (14) configured to direct at least one first energy beam (28) to a first face (44) of a component (24), the first face (44) has a first orientation, the at least one second consolidation device (60) configured to simultaneously direct at least one second energy beam (70) to at least one second face (25) of the component (24) as the first consolidation device (14) directs the at least one first energy beam (28) toward the first face (44), the second face (25) has a second orientation different from the first orientation, said controller (34) configured to: receive a build file, the build file defining a plurality of first scan paths (40) for the first consolidation device (14) and a plurality of second scan paths (40) for the second consolidation device (60); 

 control the first consolidation device (14), based on the build file, to consolidate a plurality of first particles (45) along the plurality of first scan paths (40) to form at least a portion of the first face (44); and control the second consolidation device (60), based on the build file, to direct the at least one second energy beam (70) to the second face (25) along the plurality of second scan paths (40). 13. The controller (34) in accordance with Claim 12, wherein said controller (34) is configured to control the second consolidation device (60), based on the build file, to finish the second face (25). 14. The controller (34) in accordance with Claim 12, wherein said controller (34) is configured to control the second consolidation device (60), based on the build file, to consolidate the second face (25). 15. The controller (34) in accordance with Claim 12, wherein said controller (34) is configured to move the second consolidation device (60), based on the build file, circumferentially around the component (24).
